title: What I think about Salvia Divinorum

transcript.text: Welcome to what I think about Salvia Divinorum by Kyle Pounds.
Last night I did Salvia Divinorum for the first time, probably the only time ever.
Because I just wanted to know what it was like, I'd heard about it, but it's too much.
And it was...
Well, what happened was, I took the green, which is the stuff they even get out for free at the store,
Because it's not even supposed to be the real trip.
It's just the opener trip, and then you have yellow,
And then red, and then blue, and then purple,
And then I guess other companies make stuff that's even way stronger.
So I did green.
The first one I did it with was taking tiny little hits.
I was just kind of getting high and was kind of enjoying it.
But I wanted to get the psychedelic effect, so I poured almost the whole bag in,
My bong, and I took a big hit, held it in as long as I could.
And then I exhaled it, and I saw this big puff of smoke come out.
And then pretty much right after that, I found myself in this room,
A rainbow room.
It's like a shape of an egg that I'm inside of,
And it's about as big as a normal room.
And it had these stripes of rainbow colors that are maybe a foot to a foot and a half wide
That went along the side like this.
I was the only one in the room, although I did feel that I existed,
And I was in a world where other beings existed.
I think maybe in the beginning I saw her being a being or something to my left.
I was kind of maybe laughing at me.
I don't know.
But I was blissed out inside of this room.
I had no idea.
Other than that, there was no thought going on in my head.
And then as it started to wear off, I could see the rainbow colors start to fall into my
Arms really fast, like that fast.
And I put my arm out, and I could feel in between my arms like my soul was connected between my arm and my body
In this really thin, very thin filament.
And in between the rainbow colors coming down, I could see the real world.
And then that's when the person I was with and I was facing appeared to me,
And the face appeared to me when they were saying, are you okay?
First, I didn't know who it was.
And then I realized who it was, and then I realized what was happening,
And that I was completely out of control, which scared me.
So I thought that I wanted to get my body back, and I thought I could.
At this point, I still didn't realize that all I had to do was wait for it to cycle through.
My system.
So I thought that I could get my body back faster if I stuck my arm through a hole that I could see.
It was coming down, but I had to do it fast because, so that I didn't hit the rainbow.
And I didn't want to hit the rainbow because I thought I could get my body back
If I stuck my arm through the clear part where I could see the room.
So I started doing that really fast, and I guess the person I was with thought I was having a convulsion,
So he said I was doing both my arms and my legs.
And then my brain came to, and I realized that all I had to do, I realized where I was again
And who I was and what was going on, and I realized that all I had to do was sit there and wait.
So I just sat there and waited as the colors came down.
And then I kind of was relaxing, but I wasn't comfortable.
And then I became, and then I came down, and then I felt kind of like, I guess,
How you would feel if you were really stoned on marijuana, although it wasn't nearly as good of a high
Because of marijuana, it's a psychedelic, and this wasn't a psychedelic.
It was just a high, a physical high.
And also marijuana is an aphrodisiac, and I wasn't feeling no aphrodisiac qualities about it at all.
And so I was just really weirded out, and I played a game of Call of Duty 4 with my buddy,
And he totally annihilated me.
My brain wasn't really working.
I couldn't really put words together very well.
And I remember as I was coming down, I was begging with higher powers to allow me to get my brain back
Because I was seriously worrying about suffering permanent brain damage at that point while I was still high.
And I made a deal.
If they let me get my body back and my brain back, I promised I'd never do it again.
So I don't think I'm ever going to do it again.
That's too much for me.
I don't, I mean, maybe one day.
But at this point, I have, I wasn't really completely there today.
And I mean, if I do that drug, I don't think I can stay on top of things after that.
I mean, same thing with marijuana.
If I were to smoke marijuana now, I would have my shit together for a day or two anyway.
So it's kind of the same thing.
But so that was just the weak stuff.
If I had actually taken the strong stuff, maybe I would have been in that room a little bit longer.
Maybe I would have actually exited the room and walked around with some spirits if I had ever met spirits.
I'm sure they would be real spirits on the other side.
Would I recommend doing it?
Sure, I recommend doing it once, but not more than once.
I don't know.
I don't know.
Because I'm not totally sure it doesn't cause brain damage.
The FDA hasn't done tests on it.
Maybe there's people out there who know more about it that would say that it doesn't cause brain damage.
So go ahead and do it.
I don't know.
Just do it at your own risk.
I'm sorry if I piss people off who do it and thinking that I'm contributing to making it illegal.
But I can't help myself.
I just have to share my thoughts.
It's my problem.
So the guy who we bought it from at the store at the head shop said that he thinks it's going to be illegal next year.
So maybe I should go and stockpile up on the strong stuff just in case everyone would trip it again.
I mentioned to my mom today that I did it and she says that I should stay away from it because it's bad.

And she said that I did a trip with her in these hot springs a few months back and she saw this plant and she said that she was taken aback by it because it's a very beautiful four foot high plant or something.
And she could feel this powerful energy coming off it.
So she found out what plant it was and it turned out to be that plant.
So I guess it's a very pretty plant.
I haven't seen photos of it yet.
But so it's I mean I've taken five bits of acid a few times and you know a quarter of mushrooms a few times and I've had the visuals kind of like where my hand gets fat and thin and short and fat.
The acid you know and then maybe some bad trips where I feel like my my all of my my nerves are grinding together and that's not a good feeling and feeling like I have to consciously breathe.
You know if I don't do that then I'll just stop breathing and die.
I mean those are the bad trips I've had on acid.
As far as that I mean beyond that on acid and mushrooms I've always known that I was in the world.
This stuff makes acid and mushrooms even five hits of it seem like child's play.
You probably have to eat like hundreds of hits of acid to be as far gone as I was on this stuff.
So this stuff will blow you away.
It was very frightening for me to realize that I was in no control as I was coming back down.
But during the peak of it when I was in the rainbow room it was great to be completely oblivious in this rainbow room without a body.
So that's what I think about salvia de la norma.
